/api/vender/product/add
Post
- Name
- brand
- description
- short descriptions
- price per unit
- unit ( kg, .. ) string
- discount
- product catagory
- delivary categpory
- stock : num
- Photos [“”,///]
- in authentication bearer token

Response
{
success: true/false,
message: “successfully submitted for verification” / “server error”
}
